ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "iso" TEXT /* ISO designation of the material */,
  "material_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of material */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Detailed designation of the material */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the material */,
  "hardness" TEXT /* Hardness of the material */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer of the material */,
  "manufacturing_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was manufactured */,
  "tensile_strength" TEXT /* Tensile strength of the material */,
  "yield_strength" TEXT /* Yield strength of the material */,
  "density" TEXT /* Density of the material */,
  "thermal_conductivity" TEXT /* Thermal conductivity of the material */,
  "electrical_conductivity" TEXT /* Electrical conductivity of the material */,
  "corrosion_resistance" TEXT /* Corrosion resistance of the material */,
  "chemical_composition" TEXT /* Chemical composition of the material */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the material */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost per unit of the material */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the material data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_material_type FOREIGN KEY ("material_type") REFERENCES material_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_hardness FOREIGN KEY ("hardness") REFERENCES hardness_scale ("hardness_value"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_materials_condition FOREIGN KEY ("condition") REFERENCES material_conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cutting_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the cutting recommendation */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material associated with this recommendation */,
  "vc_min" INTEGER /* Minimum cutting speed recommendation in m/min */,
  "vc_max" INTEGER /* Maximum cutting speed recommendation in m/min */,
  "tool_type" TEXT /* Type of cutting tool recommended */,
  "coolant_type" TEXT /* Type of coolant recommended */,
  "feed_rate_min" TEXT /* Minimum feed rate recommendation in mm/min */,
  "feed_rate_max" TEXT /* Maximum feed rate recommendation in mm/min */,
  "depth_of_cut_min" TEXT /* Minimum depth of cut recommendation in mm */,
  "depth_of_cut_max" TEXT /* Maximum depth of cut recommendation in mm */,
  "spindle_speed_min" INTEGER /* Minimum spindle speed recommendation in RPM */,
  "spindle_speed_max" INTEGER /* Maximum spindle speed recommendation in RPM */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the recommendation was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cutting_recommendations_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of material */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the material type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardness_scale" (
  "hardness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hardness scale entry */,
  "hardness_value" TEXT /* Value of the hardness measurement */,
  "scale_name" TEXT /* Name of the hardness scale (e.g., HB for Brinell hardness) */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value of the hardness range */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value of the hardness range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hardness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the material */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material that was changed */,
  "changed_field" TEXT /* Field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_history_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)
